message:
test(bd-3fcm): add unit tests for context sampling, elicitation, and McpContext builders

Cover SamplingRequest builder chain, message roles, SamplingResponse
defaults, NoOp senders returning errors, ElicitationRequest constructors,
McpContext with_sampling/with_elicitation enabling capability flags,
depth setters, Debug output, cx() accessor, and trace().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
